title: Discrete Event Record
description: Canonical envelope for discrete, low-volume occurrences distinct from continuous log streams: deployments, scaling actions, configuration changes, feature-flag flips, incident lifecycle transitions, model rollouts. Events feed the correlation layer (Chapter 11) and are immutable once written.

event_id.description: Producer-generated UUIDv4; pipeline-deduplicated within a 24-hour window.

event_type.description: Canonical event taxonomy. Add new types only via change-control (Chapter 25, Section 5).

event_time.description: RFC 3339 UTC timestamp of the business occurrence (not the ingest time).

ingest_time.description: Collector ingest timestamp; populated by the pipeline.

system.description: Originating system, e.g. github-actions, argocd, k8s-hpa, opsgenie, mlflow.

principal.description: Actor that caused the event: service-account, user-id (hashed), or automation name.

subject.description: What the event is about. At least one of service / model / incident must be present.

severity.description: Operational severity; for incident.* events must match the incident severity.

payload.description: Event-type-specific data. Schema-per-type is enforced by the validating consumer (Chapter 11, Section 4).

ref.description: Event id, incident id, or external URN.
